title: FoMoE: Breaking the Full-Replica Barrier with a Federation of MoEs
abstract: Pre-training Large Language Models (LLMs) typically demands large-scale infrastructure with tightly coupled hardware accelerators. While increasing model and dataset scale remains the dominant driver
abstract_zh: FoMoE来啦！这个大模型工具简直就是加班族的救星。想象一下，你正在写周报，数据量一多就崩溃了——但FoMoE不一样，它打破了全复制的壁垒，用联邦模式帮你高效处理海量信息，就像有私人助手在背后默默支持你。调Bug时更是杠杠的！赶紧试试吧，让效率飙升不是梦！
